name: Mancha Manteles De Cerdo (Pork Tablecloth Sta
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Boneless pork, cut into 1-inch cubes
12 oz Can tomato sauce (homemade or store-bought)
10 oz Package corn in can, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut ancho and pasilla chilies open and discard stems and seeds. Cut chilies into small pieces.
2. Cover chilies with boiling water and let stand 45 to 60 minutes. Drain and reserve the liquid.
3. In a Dutch oven, combine pork, reserved broth, bay leaf, thyme, oregano, cloves, salt, and pepper. Bring to a simmer and cook for 40 minutes or until pork is nearly tender.
4. Remove pork with a slotted spoon and set aside. Blend tomato sauce, onion, drained peppers (or crushed red pepper), cilantro, garlic, and reserved broth in a blender until smooth.
5. Add blended mixture, apples, pears, zucchini, corn, pineapple, and bananas to the Dutch oven. Return pork to the pot.
6. Cover and simmer for 10 minutes. Taste and adjust seasoning if needed.
7. Serve hot with rice or bread.
